name: ONCREF Webpage to Structured JSON Agentic AI System
description: Automated conversion of unstructured oncology conference webpages into validated structured datasets, reducing manual data extraction effort by 80% and enabling scalable downstream research workflows.

name: Medical RAG Hallucination Evaluation Framework
description: Built an evaluation framework to measure hallucination reduction and retrieval effectiveness in medical question answering, improving Gemini accuracy from 70% to 78% through retrieval augmented generation.

name: Multi Class Depression Detection
description: Developed an automated depression severity classification system for mental health assessment, achieving 81% accuracy across Highly Depressed, Moderately Depressed, and Not Depressed categories.

name: Wearable AI for Real Time Plant Species Identification
description: Built an edge AI powered plant identification system for low connectivity environments, achieving 79.46% Top 1 Accuracy, 95.35% Top 5 Accuracy, and supporting classification across 1,081 plant species.

name: AI Resume Chatbot Twin
description: Developed a recruiter facing AI assistant that enables semantic exploration of candidate experience, skills, and projects, reducing manual resume screening effort through natural language search.

name: UniChat Multilingual Real Time Chat with Sentiment AI
description: Built a multilingual communication platform with real time translation and sentiment analysis, improving accessibility and engagement across users speaking different languages.

name: Dynamic Attendance Management System
description: Role-based web application for managing, updating, and tracking attendance for students and teachers.
